title: UBA CBC Requirements 2026 | Hacé Cuentas
description: Check if you'll maintain regular status at UBA CBC. Enter your attendance and exam scores to see if you meet the 2026 requirements.
intro: Modern study methods leverage cognitive science principles like spaced repetition, active recall, and interleaving for faster learning and better retention. This calculator helps UBA CBC students verify their academic standing based on attendance and exam scores. Requirements are current for 2026 and reviewed regularly to keep you informed.
keyTakeaway: Formula: **attendance + exam scores**. Enter your values to check your academic standing. UBA CBC requirements for 2026.
useCases: Verify academic standing status for CBC courses
explanation:
**Study methods and learning techniques** are rooted in cognitive science (Ebbinghaus, Bjork, Dunlosky). Techniques like spaced repetition, active recall, and interleaving have strong empirical support.

## How It Works

UBA CBC requires minimum attendance and passing scores on exams to maintain regular status. This calculator applies the formula with your values, checking typical ranges and alerting if values fall outside reasonable bounds.

## Important Notes

This calculation is a reference tool only. For critical decisions (academic, financial, or legal), consult with a qualified professional. Values are current for 2026 and reviewed regularly.

faq.q: What is academic standing at UBA?
faq.a: Academic standing (regularidad) is your official status as a CBC student. You maintain regular status with 75% minimum attendance and passing exam scores.

faq.q: What exam scores do I need?
faq.a: Each exam (parcial) must score at least 4 out of 10 to pass. Your overall average is calculated from both exams.

faq.q: Can I retake exams if I fail?
faq.a: Yes, if you fail one exam, you can take a makeup exam (recuperatorio). If you fail both, you'll need to retake the course.
The final exam is your last assessment. It's in-person and covers all course material. You must maintain regular status to be eligible.

faq.q: What is the CBC at UBA?
faq.a: The CBC (Common Basic Cycle) is the foundational program required for most UBA undergraduate degrees. It typically includes 6 courses: 4 mandatory and 2 electives aligned with your major.

faq.q: How long does the CBC take?
faq.a: The CBC typically takes 1 year if you study full-time, or 1-2 years if studying part-time while working.

faq.q: Is English required for UBA CBC?
faq.a: Many careers require intermediate English proficiency. Check your specific degree program for language requirements.

faq.q: Are all the calculators on this site free?
faq.a: Yes, all our calculators are completely free and require no registration.

sources.name: NIST — National Institute of Standards and Technology

dataUpdate.notes: Fixed formula, no external data updates required
